:- use_module(library(clpfd)).
solve :-
    Vars = [Bob, Peter, Arnold, Eric, Alice,
        Stew, Stir_Fry, Spaghetti, Grilled_Cheese, Pizza,
        Watermelon_Smoothie, Lime_Smoothie, Desert_Smoothie, Dragonfruit_Smoothie, Cherry_Smoothie,
        Fantasy_Books, Biography_Books, Mystery_Books, Science_Fiction_Books, Romance_Books,
        Photography, Knitting, Cooking, Gardening, Painting],
    Vars ins 1..5,
    Names = [Bob, Peter, Arnold, Eric, Alice],
    Lunches = [Stew, Stir_Fry, Spaghetti, Grilled_Cheese, Pizza],
    Smoothies = [Watermelon_Smoothie, Lime_Smoothie, Desert_Smoothie, Dragonfruit_Smoothie, Cherry_Smoothie],
    BookGenres = [Fantasy_Books, Biography_Books, Mystery_Books, Science_Fiction_Books, Romance_Books],
    Hobbies = [Photography, Knitting, Cooking, Gardening, Painting],
    all_different(Names),
    all_different(Lunches),
    all_different(Smoothies),
    all_different(BookGenres),
    all_different(Hobbies),

    %% Clue 1: The person who loves stir fry is the Desert smoothie lover.
    Stir_Fry #= Desert_Smoothie,

    %% Clue 2: The person who loves the spaghetti eater is the person who enjoys gardening.
    Spaghetti #= Gardening,

    %% Clue 3: Bob is somewhere to the left of the person who loves mystery books.
    Bob #< Mystery_Books,

    %% Clue 4: The person who paints as a hobby is directly left of Alice.
    Painting #= Alice - 1,

    %% Clue 5: The Desert smoothie lover is the person who loves romance books.
    Desert_Smoothie #= Romance_Books,

    %% Clue 6: The photography enthusiast and the person who loves eating grilled cheese are next to each other.
    abs(Photography - Grilled_Cheese) =:= 1,

    %% Clue 7: The person who loves cooking is somewhere to the left of the Desert smoothie lover.
    Cooking #< Desert_Smoothie,

    %% Clue 8: The person who likes Cherry smoothies is Alice.
    Cherry_Smoothie #= Alice,

    %% Clue 9: There is one house between the person who drinks Lime smoothies and the person who enjoys gardening.
    abs(Lime_Smoothie - Gardening) =:= 2,

    %% Clue 10: The Watermelon smoothie lover is Eric.
    Watermelon_Smoothie #= Eric,

    %% Clue 11: The person who loves eating grilled cheese is directly left of the Dragonfruit smoothie lover.
    Grilled_Cheese #= Dragonfruit_Smoothie - 1,

    %% Clue 12: The person who is a pizza lover is Alice.
    Pizza #= Alice,

    %% Clue 13: The person who loves romance books is Peter.
    Romance_Books #= Peter,

    %% Clue 14: The person who loves fantasy books is the Watermelon smoothie lover.
    Fantasy_Books #= Watermelon_Smoothie,

    %% Clue 15: Alice is the person who loves biography books.
    Biography_Books #= Alice,

    %% Clue 16: Eric is not in the third house.
    Eric #\= 3,

    labeling([], Vars),
    write(Vars), nl.
